---
title: "Resources & Reading List"
subtitle: "Curated entry points into the LLM agents literature"
---

## Getting Started

If you're new to LLM agents, start with these:

1. **[Lilian Weng — LLM Powered Autonomous Agents](https://lilianweng.github.io/posts/2023-06-23-agent/)** (June 2023)  
   The most widely cited blog post introduction to the field. Covers planning, memory, tool use with great diagrams.

2. **[Agentic Large Language Models: A Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.23037)** (Plaat et al., JAIR 2025)  
   Peer-reviewed survey organizing the field around **Reason–Act–Interact**. Introduces the virtuous cycle framing, covers theory of mind and emergent social behavior, and provides a research agenda. Also at [alphaxiv](https://www.alphaxiv.org/abs/2503.23037) with annotations. Companion site: [askeplaat.github.io/agentic-llm-survey-site](https://askeplaat.github.io/agentic-llm-survey-site/)

3. **[ReAct paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.03629)** (Yao et al., 2022)  
   The canonical agent loop: Reason + Act interleaved. Essential reading.

4. **[A Survey on Large Language Model based Autonomous Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.11432)** (Wang et al., 2023)  
   Comprehensive academic survey covering construction, application, and evaluation.

---

## Key Survey Papers

| Title | Authors | Year | Link |
|-------|---------|------|------|
| A Survey on Large Language Model based Autonomous Agents | Wang et al. | 2023 | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.11432) |
| The Rise and Potential of Large Language Model Based Agents | Xi et al. | 2023 | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.07864) |
| **Agentic Large Language Models, a survey** *(JAIR 2025)* | Plaat et al. (Leiden) | 2025 | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.23037) · [site](https://askeplaat.github.io/agentic-llm-survey-site/) |
| Agent AI: Surveying the Horizons of Multimodal Interaction | Wang et al. | 2024 | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.03568) |
| Large Language Models as Tool Makers | Cai et al. | 2023 | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.17126) |

---

## Essential Papers by Category

### Foundations
- **ReAct** — [arxiv.org/abs/2210.03629](https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.03629)
- **Toolformer** — [arxiv.org/abs/2302.04761](https://arxiv.org/abs/2302.04761)
- **Chain-of-Thought Prompting** — [arxiv.org/abs/2201.11903](https://arxiv.org/abs/2201.11903)
- **MRKL Systems** — [arxiv.org/abs/2205.00445](https://arxiv.org/abs/2205.00445)
- **WebGPT** — [arxiv.org/abs/2112.09332](https://arxiv.org/abs/2112.09332)

### Reasoning & Planning
- **Tree of Thoughts** — [arxiv.org/abs/2305.10601](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.10601)
- **Reflexion** — [arxiv.org/abs/2303.11366](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.11366)
- **Self-Refine** — [arxiv.org/abs/2303.17651](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.17651)

### Multi-Agent
- **CAMEL** — [arxiv.org/abs/2303.17760](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.17760)
- **MetaGPT** — [arxiv.org/abs/2308.00352](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.00352)
- **AutoGen** — [arxiv.org/abs/2308.08155](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.08155)
- **Generative Agents** — [arxiv.org/abs/2304.03442](https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.03442)
- **ChatDev** — [arxiv.org/abs/2307.07924](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.07924)

### Memory
- **MemGPT** — [arxiv.org/abs/2310.08560](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.08560)

### Tools & Actions
- **HuggingGPT / JARVIS** — [arxiv.org/abs/2303.17580](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.17580)
- **Gorilla LLM** — [arxiv.org/abs/2305.15334](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.15334)
- **ToolLLM** — [arxiv.org/abs/2307.16789](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.16789)

### Coding Agents
- **SWE-agent** — [arxiv.org/abs/2405.15793](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.15793)
- **CodeAct** — [arxiv.org/abs/2402.01030](https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.01030)
- **SWE-bench** — [arxiv.org/abs/2310.06770](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.06770)

---

## Key Frameworks (GitHub)

| Framework | GitHub | Description |
|-----------|--------|-------------|
| LangChain | [github.com/langchain-ai/langchain](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain) | Full-stack agent framework |
| LangGraph | [github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph) | Graph-based agent workflows |
| AutoGen | [github.com/microsoft/autogen](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen) | Multi-agent conversation |
| CrewAI | [github.com/joaomdmoura/crewAI](https://github.com/joaomdmoura/crewAI) | Role-based agent crews |
| SWE-agent | [github.com/princeton-nlp/SWE-agent](https://github.com/princeton-nlp/SWE-agent) | GitHub issue resolution |
| OpenDevin | [github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands](https://github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands) | Open software dev agent |
| DSPy | [github.com/stanfordnlp/dspy](https://github.com/stanfordnlp/dspy) | Programming language models |
| MemGPT | [github.com/cpacker/MemGPT](https://github.com/cpacker/MemGPT) | Agents with long-term memory |

---

## Influential Blog Posts

| Title | Author | Date |
|-------|--------|------|
| [LLM Powered Autonomous Agents](https://lilianweng.github.io/posts/2023-06-23-agent/) | Lilian Weng | Jun 2023 |
| [Emerging Architectures for LLM Applications](https://a16z.com/emerging-architectures-for-llm-applications/) | a16z | Jun 2023 |
| [The Anatomy of Autonomy](https://www.sequoiacap.com/article/ai-agents-perspective/) | Sequoia Capital | 2023 |
| [What We Learned from a Year of Building with LLMs](https://applied-llms.org) | Various practitioners | 2024 |
| [Building effective agents](https://www.anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents) | Anthropic | Dec 2024 |

---

## Benchmarks & Evaluation

| Benchmark | Focus | Link |
|-----------|-------|------|
| SWE-bench | Software engineering tasks | [swebench.com](https://www.swebench.com) |
| WebArena | Web navigation | [arxiv.org/abs/2307.13854](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.13854) |
| AgentBench | Multi-domain agent eval | [arxiv.org/abs/2308.03688](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.03688) |
| GAIA | General AI assistant tasks | [arxiv.org/abs/2311.12983](https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.12983) |
| OSWorld | Desktop GUI tasks | [arxiv.org/abs/2404.07972](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.07972) |

---

## Courses & Tutorials

- **[DeepLearning.AI — AI Agents in LangGraph](https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/ai-agents-in-langgraph/)** — Harrison Chase + Andrew Ng
- **[DeepLearning.AI — Multi AI Agent Systems with crewAI](https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/multi-ai-agent-systems-with-crewai/)** — João Moura
- **[DeepLearning.AI — AI Agentic Design Patterns with AutoGen](https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/ai-agentic-design-patterns-with-autogen/)** — Chi Wang + Qingyun Wu
- **[Hugging Face — Agents Course](https://huggingface.co/learn/agents-course)** — Free, hands-on

---

## About This Survey

This survey was compiled in **March 2026** by [John P. Lake](https://github.com/johnplake). It covers the LLM agent literature from 2022 through early 2026.

[View source on GitHub](https://github.com/johnplake/llm-agents-survey) · [Report an issue](https://github.com/johnplake/llm-agents-survey/issues)
